title: QFINHUB Authority Acquisition Engine — Phase 15.1
why_this_exists: QFINHUB has 0 backlinks and 0 referring domains after 32 days. Google will not rank a finance site without external trust signals. Every other optimization is secondary until backlinks arrive. This engine runs daily to systematically acquire authority.

authority_gap.gap_severity: 🔴 CRITICAL — 0 of 10 minimum. This is the single biggest growth blocker.

step_a_follow_ups.description: Check all previously contacted prospects. Send follow-ups only when due date has arrived AND no reply received.
rules: Only send if follow_up_due date ≤ today
Only send if no reply received
Only send if status is 'sent' or 'sent_email'
NEVER follow up on manual_required targets
Personalize each follow-up — reference the original pitch

step_b_new_prospects.description: Find 5 new link/embed prospects per day from high-quality finance and adjacent sites. Research their content to find natural link opportunities.

prospect_categories.pitch_angle: Your readers would find our free [calculator] tool useful. We'd be honored to be included in your resources.
We built a free mortgage affordability calculator that gives homebuyers their exact budget in 30 seconds. Happy to share if it helps your audience.
We created free debt payoff and budgeting tools that align with your mission of helping people achieve financial wellness. No cost, no ads, just helpful tools.
Your FIRE community would appreciate our free compound interest and retirement calculators — fast, no-signup tools for planning financial independence.
We noticed your calculator resource page. We have 125 free financial calculators that might complement your existing tools.
Our free mortgage affordability calculator helps first-time homebuyers understand what they can afford — a perfect fit for your education materials.
Our student loan and budget calculators help college students make smarter financial decisions. Free, no-signup tools for your financial literacy program.

step_b_new_prospects.discovery_method: Python script: search Brave/Google for each search_term → extract 10 results → filter for blogs/resource pages (not competitors) → score by domain authority → select top 5 → find contact email on contact/about page

step_c_linkable_assets.description: Every week, create or improve one linkable asset that other sites will naturally want to link to.

current_assets.name: Mortgage Affordability Embed Widget
current_assets.target_audience: real estate blogs, mortgage sites, homebuyer resources
current_assets.pitch: Embed our free mortgage affordability calculator on your site — your visitors calculate their budget without leaving your page.

outreach_quality_rules.personalization: Reference a specific article or resource on their site. Show you actually read their content.
outreach_quality_rules.value_first: Explain what their audience gets — a useful free tool/resource. Never lead with 'we want a backlink.'
outreach_quality_rules.identity: Sign as Qasem Mohammed / QFINHUB. Use real identity, not 'The QFINHUB Team.'
forbidden: More than one follow-up (one follow-up max per prospect)
Contact form automation if site has Cloudflare (blocked)
outreach_quality_rules.template_structure: Personalized greeting → reference their specific content → explain our tool → how it helps their audience → gentle ask → real signature

current_pipeline.next_new_prospect_batch: Ready to run — 5/day when Auditor approves
